full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: My FGM reproduction on Ionosphere gives different accuracy than the paper's WDBC results. How should I explain this gap honestly in the report?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested 4 reasons: dataset difference, simplified MKL, no cross-validation averaging, different B value. Used all four in my explanation.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Each reason is traceable: dataset difference from Table 1, simplified MKL from Section 2.3, cross-validation from Section 3.4 ('repeated 30 times'), B from Section 3.4.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What plots should I include in task_2_3 to clearly compare FGM, FGM-B, SVM-RFE, and SVM(ALL)?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested bar chart for accuracy/sparsity, accuracy-vs-features line plot, and confusion matrix. All three implemented.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Bar chart mirrors Table 3 style. Accuracy-vs-features mirrors Figure 4. Confusion matrix is a standard classification diagnostic.

full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified against the Part B document reproducibility checklist section. All 5 items explicitly mentioned there.
